children.heading: Administrative Unit
children.label: 1 Administrative Unit
children.text: The term “Administrative Unit” means a national forest or national grassland.

children.heading: Outfitter or guide
children.label: 2 Outfitter or guide
children.text: The term “outfitter or guide” means an individual, organization, or business who provides outfitting or guiding services, as defined in section 251.51 of title 36, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Partner
children.label: 3 Partner
children.text: The term “partner” means a non-Federal entity that engages in a partnership.

children.heading: Partnership
children.label: 4 Partnership
children.text: The term “partnership” means arrangements between the Department of Agriculture or the Forest Service and a non-Federal entity that are voluntary, mutually beneficial, and entered into for the purpose of mutually agreed-upon objectives.

children.heading: Priority area
children.label: 5 Priority area
children.text: The term “priority area” means a well-defined region on National Forest System land selected by the Secretary under .section 583k–3(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Strategy
children.label: 7 Strategy
children.text: The term “strategy” means the National Forest System Trails Volunteer and Partnership Strategy authorized by .section 583k–2(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: ensuring trails are passable by the users for which they are managed;

children.label: B
children.text: preventing environmental damage resulting from trail deterioration;

children.heading: Volunteer
children.label: 9 Volunteer
children.text: The term “volunteer” means an individual whose services are accepted by the Secretary without compensation under the Volunteers in the National Forests Act of 1972 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 558a1See References in Text note below.1
